name: This implies two things. First, Allah does not stand in need of anybody's charity, for He
introduction:
is Self-Sufficient. Secondly, He likes those people who are generous and large-hearted, but
does not like frivolous and narrow-minded people, for He Himself is Generous, Clement
and Forbearing. How, then Allah, Who bestows on the people the necessities of life without
stint, and forgives and pardons them over and over again in spite of their errors, would like
those who mar the self-respect of a person by sending repeated reminders of their charity
and making pointed references to it even though they might have given only a farthing. A
Tradition of the Holy Prophet says that on the Day of Resurrection, Allah will neither speak
a word nor even so much as look at a person who makes pointed references to the gift he
gave to some one.
